message:
fix: make tui an empty feature in CI instead of removing it

Removing the tui feature definition caused unexpected_cfgs errors
for #[cfg(feature = "tui")] in source code. Instead, rewrite tui
to an empty feature list so cfg checks remain valid but ftui path
deps are not referenced. Also fix no_effect_underscore_binding
lint in ewma.rs test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -24,9 +24,9 @@ jobs:
       - name: Strip local-only TUI path deps
         run: |
           # ftui crates use /dp/frankentui/ paths unavailable in CI; strip them
+          # ftui crates use /dp/frankentui/ paths unavailable in CI
           sed -i '/^ftui.*=.*{.*path.*=.*"\/dp\//d' Cargo.toml
-          sed -i '/^tui = \["dep:ftui/d' Cargo.toml
-          sed -i 's/, "tui"//g' Cargo.toml
+          sed -i 's/^tui = \["dep:ftui.*\]/tui = []/' Cargo.toml
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
         with:
           components: rustfmt, clippy
@@ -44,9 +44,9 @@ jobs:

       - name: Run unit tests
